section_miscategorizations.text: He also reports chest pain and belly pain, which require further evaluation.
section_miscategorizations.reason: The clause 'He also reports chest pain and belly pain' is purely patient-reported symptom history and belongs in the Subjective section; only the need for further evaluation is part of the assessment. As written, the sentence mixes subjective symptoms into the Assessment, which is a mild organizational issue but not highly misleading.
